steps.title: Understand the constant function
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=39$. Because there is no $x$ term, the output is always $39$ no matter what input is used.

steps.title: Evaluate the listed inputs
steps.content: For the table inputs $0$, $1$, and $2$: $$f(0)=39$$ $$f(1)=39$$ $$f(2)=39$$ The correct table must have $39$ in every output row.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B is the only table with outputs $39$, $39$, and $39$. Choices A, C, and D show outputs that do not stay equal to $39$, so choice B is correct.
